name: Topgolf Swing Suite at Marina Station
about: Topgolf Swing Suite at Marina Station is located at The Ridges Resort and offers a combination golf simulator experience with 40 virtual golf courses and a variety of non-golf games. The facility features three private bays, each accommodating up to eight players, and provides a space for gaming, sports viewing, and social gatherings. Guests can enjoy casual food and beverage offerings while toggling between Topgolf games and televised sports on large screens, making it suitable for various events from casual outings to corporate parties. The venue operates with an hourly rental model and offers packages for birthday celebrations, corporate events, and private viewing parties.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 40 virtual golf courses with realistic simulation
Ability to switch between golf games and sports viewing on large screens
Private, climate-controlled bays for groups up to 8 people
Hybrid experience combining golf with entertainment and socializing
No need for personal equipment as clubs are provided

food_and_drink.notes: Casual food offerings available with limited menu from Marina Station party menu
Full-service bar available with drinks and beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Combination golf simulator bay with integrated technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: No, golf clubs are provided for use in the simulator bays. Golf and shooting games require staff assistance.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and beverages are not allowed on the hit pad. However, the venue offers a casual food menu and full-service bar with drinks and bites available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on group size and pace, but the venue operates on an hourly basis with bays rented at $40 per hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for families with children. Birthday party packages are available, and each bay can accommodate up to 8 people, including kids.
